caption: A man wearing a large, tall, grey synthetic wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a room that resembles a clothing boutique or studio, with framed photos and apparel displayed on the walls behind him. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved button-down shirt with brown suspenders and a red bow tie. A black professional microphone is positioned in front of him. On the screen, a logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appears in the lower-left and lower-right corners. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand. His facial expression shifts as he talks, with his mouth opening and closing, while his head tilts slightly. The background and equipment remain static throughout the clip as the camera focuses on his upper body and expressions.
